title: Level = Border
description: Level=Border: A YouTube project by German Minecraft YouTuber “BastiGHG” for a newer MC version. [discontinued]
body:
# Level = Border 

This Mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)!

This is a [YouTube project](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLffX9yMQbaQjWGBY1LS9RDH-Wu65zwQyQ) by German Minecraft YouTuber “[BastiGHG](https://www.youtube.com/@BastiGHG)”. I have implemented his challenge in the form of this mod in new Minecraft versions (1.21.8) and with config options.     
Have fun! :D

I made this Mod with **[MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)!**

**Report Issues on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/mZD8FnCJNc)!**



To-Do:
- just join my discord to get a link to a better alternative mod
